# Double Hathi

> Premium Kachi Ghani (cold-pressed) mustard oil brand from Aditya Oil Industries, Bharatpur, India — trusted by families since 1989.

Double Hathi produces 100% pure, chemical-free mustard oil using the traditional Kachi Ghani cold-pressing method. Products are sold in retail packs from 200ml bottles to 15L bulk tins, and are also distributed through a nationwide dealer network.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Brand story, process, products, and how to order Double Hathi mustard oil.
- [Products](/products): Full range of Kachi Ghani mustard oil pack sizes with prices.
- [1 Litre Pouch](/products/1): Best-selling 1L pouch — daily-cooking Kachi Ghani mustard oil.
- [200ml Bottle](/products/2): Trial-size 200ml pack of pure Kachi Ghani mustard oil.
- [500ml Pouch](/products/3): Mid-size 500ml pouch suited to small households.
- [5 Litre Jar](/products/4): Bulk 5L jar for large families and commercial kitchens.
- [15 Litre Tin](/products/5): Wholesale 15L tin for caterers and bulk buyers.
- [Distributor Inquiry](/dealer-inquiry): Apply to become a Double Hathi distributor, wholesaler, or stockist.

## Optional

- [Checkout](/checkout): Order form used to place a direct purchase via WhatsApp.
